title: dortmanna zeylanica
intro: Dortmanna zeylanica, also known as Zeylanic dock or common dock, is a type of plant belonging to the family Polygonaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation, which can help alleviate conditions such as arthritis and gout. The health benefits of Dortmanna zeylanica include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and soothe digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
